name: Get Bath Direct Targetting for National Campaigns

content.query:
SELECT
[FirstName]
,[LastName]
,[Address1]
,[Address2]
,[City]
,[State]
,[Zip]
,[Phone]
,[Email]
,[Productid]
,[EntryDate]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_TCT_ClientLeads]
 where EntryDate >= '2023-01-01'
 and Sold = 0
and ClientID not in 
 (
     'gn07db','i417db','f199db','yy72db','d453db','v3v3db','a5b5db','zz99db'
 )
 and productid IN
 (
'1DayBath',
'2ndBath',
'AHI WIS',
'Amaz WITS',
'Bath',
